case_title: JIA JIAN LIN VS. MARIA NORMA DOLD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY LIN, JIA JIAN AS TO DEFENDANT DOLD, MARIA NORMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2016 BY DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JIA JIAN LIN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED OCT-24-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOLD, MARIA NORMA
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DOLD, MARIA NORMA HEARING SET FOR DEC-21-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/21/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "INFUFFICIENT ADDRESSS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LIN, JIA JIAN DOLD, MARIA NORMA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2017 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY LIN, JIA JIAN
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT DOLD, MARIA NORMA

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MARIA NORMA DOLD IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAR-24-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT BASED ON AGREEMENT OF DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $160 BY THE 20TH OF EACH MONTH FROM JANUARY THROUGH OCTOBER 2017. IF NO APPEARANCES, SET ADDITIONAL PROGRESS REPORT HEARING IN JUNE 2017, AND THEN, IF NO APPEARANCE, IN NOVEMBER 2017, AT WHICH TIME IF NO APPEARANCE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-24-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JIA JIAN LIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA NORMA DOLD IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 85.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, JIA JIAN AS TO DEFENDANT DOLD, MARIA NORMA
ORDER OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, JIA JIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOLD, MARIA NORMA $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,690.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, JIA JIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOLD, MARIA NORMA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DOLD, MARIA NORMA HEARING SET FOR JUL-06-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF EXAMINATION - OFF CALENDAR ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 07/06/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER."
